pageContext.name: Black Ranger
pageContext.description: Whether using his martial arts skills on his own or teaming up with the other Mighty Morphin Power Rangers, the Mighty Morphin Black Ranger is always ready to protect Angel Grove from the forces of evil!  This 7 scale fully articulated Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ULTIMATES! Black Ranger figure features interchangeable heads to represent both Zack Taylor and Adam Park, as well as a variety of iconic accessories. He'll be a key member of any Mighty Morphin Power Rangers collection, so don't miss out on getting the made-to-order ULTIMATES! Mighty Morphin Black Ranger figure!
